creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
> Assuming this works out, Olli, please make sure you commit the Actual
> bump code in a separate commit. Also, it would be good to work up the
> deprecation patch, so we can move on that about very shortly after the
> flip since we'll need a 3-6 month deprecation notice.


I have all deprecation patches but I don't know when the exp-run will
be done. I suspect we will see apache13 in FreeBSD-9 as well ...
